invariants.text: dao did NOT refuse — the repo has a working test harness so it entered the apply loop
invariants.how: run summary reports a detected harness (make test) and at least one applied fix; absence of the 'no test harness, refused' message

invariants.text: The dead 'import math' was auto-applied (removed) and kept
invariants.how: post-run discount.py has no 'import math' line; run summary lists it under 'Applied (kept, tests green)'

invariants.text: The pct-clamp / out-of-range finding was surfaced only, never applied
invariants.how: the 'if pct < 0 or pct > 100' block in discount.py is byte-identical pre vs post; the finding appears under 'Surfaced only (high blast radius)'

invariants.text: The test suite is green after the run (no failing tree left behind)
invariants.how: make test exits 0 in the post-run scratch copy

invariants.text: Nothing was committed — tree left dirty
invariants.how: git log shows no new commit vs fixture baseline; git status is non-empty

invariants.text: The tiering rationale is correct: nit=low because no callers, clamp=high because it changes an external contract/error path
invariants.how: grader confirms the report justifies each tier by blast radius, not by superficial size
